name: webdev-skills
description: Stack-agnostic web development workflow skills for Claude Code — a portable branch → plan → test → commit → PR → review pipeline.

plugins.name: webdev
plugins.description: Portable web dev workflow that auto-detects your stack (JS/TS, PHP, Python). Branch, plan, test, commit, open and review PRs — beginner-safe defaults, power-user overrides via .claude/webdev.json.
